3174730.name: PockeDate! Original Soundtrack
3174730.description:
The PockeDate! Original Soundtrack features a vibrant mix of genres, perfectly capturing the unique and playful atmosphere of the game. From upbeat, catchy tunes to more intimate and emotional melodies, this soundtrack enhances every moment of your virtual dating adventure with Akari.

Soundtrack includes 32 tracks in MP3 or FLAC, running almost 56 minutes in total, featuring the song Pocket Dating and its instrumental version.

Art by Phantom_651.
